timeline.text:
Embracing Unity in Aviation: Air Peace and United Nigeria Airlines

At United Nigeria Airlines, we believe in the power of unity and collaboration within the aviation industry. We are honored by the kind words of Air Peace Chairman, Barr. Allen Onyema, encouraging travelers to experience our service. His endorsement is a testament to the spirit of camaraderie that defines our industry.

We believe that collaboration drives us all to excel, pushing boundaries and setting new standards for customer satisfaction and safety. Whether you choose Air Peace or United Nigeria Airlines, rest assured that your journey is in capable hands. 

Thank you, Chairman Onyema, for highlighting the importance of unity in our industry. #UnitedWithPeace 

#FlyUnitedNigeriaAirlines #FlyingToUnite #UnityInAviation #CustomerSatisfaction #SamsungUnpacked #flywithus✈️

📹 @leonphotographyng
